services.title: GCP OAuth drift query
services.summary: Diff desired OAuth clients vs Console import and vault keys (JSON on stdout).

services.title: GCP OAuth maintain
services.summary: Validate config, import credentials to vault, print Console checklist.

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure gcp-oauth query -- --import <console-json>` after Console changes.
Store client secrets in vault immediately after creating clients in Google Cloud Console.
